title: PM Live Supabase History Parity Inspection
objective: Run a non-mutating live Supabase/Postgres inspection for the PM decision-history and issue follow-up storage fields needed by PM Lane 006, then publish the truthful parity verdict without seeding, resetting, migrating, or writing production data.
constrained_outputs: Read-only live connection proof to apex_pm_stage without printing secrets
Schema parity verdict for seam.audit_log and seam.issues fields needed by PM workfront history
Live data parity verdict for PM history rows and issue PM follow-up overflow keys
No SQL write, no schema migration, no fixture reset, no demo seed, no mutation seam persisted test run, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Load the local governed SEAM_DATABASE_URL source without printing the DSN
Inspect seam.audit_log and seam.issues columns through information_schema
Count live PM decision-history rows and issue PM follow-up overflow keys
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-007 used only read-only SELECT inspection with default_transaction_read_only=on. No SQL write, migration, reset, seed, production data write, auth, ingress, or new mutation authority is authorized.
